examples: There is a concern about replenishment of the population.
The scheme quickly ran out of cash, but the White House pushed for its replenishment.
If you extract resources at a rate beyond the level of replenishment, your stock will collapse.
My conclusion is that third-quarter growth in the U.S. was mainly about inventory replenishment.
Merchandise that is basic, always in stock and always in need of replenishment will follow.
